message:
fix(scanner): populate per-root scan duration for VOI scheduler IO cost

RootScanResult.duration was initialized to Duration::ZERO and never
updated, causing the VOI scheduler's IO cost EWMA to converge toward
zero.  This made the scheduler treat all paths as equally cheap to scan,
over-scheduling expensive deep directory trees.

Distribute total scan duration evenly across roots after each pass.
The EWMA smooths any per-root imprecision over time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
